**Expected content (from page title and context):**
This is a Zscaler reference architecture guide covering Zero Trust security patterns for Azure workloads using Zscaler Cloud Connector. Based on related pages captured in this session, it likely covers:
- Cloud Connector deployment topology in Azure (VNet, subnets, load balancer)
- VMSS-based autoscaling architecture
- Traffic forwarding patterns: ZIA (internet) and ZPA (private app) integration
- Identity and access: managed identities, Azure Key Vault integration
- High availability and health monitoring design
- Reference architecture diagrams for Azure workload protection
